title: Nexus control plane: aggregate-not-own — deferred
context: Operating multiple independent projects from one place: see progress, update goals, give feedback.

options.name: central-state
options.rationale: Nexus owns a copy of all project state.

options.name: lens-and-dispatcher
options.rationale: Nexus aggregates per-project status digests and dispatches operator commands down; only durable state is a registry of projects.
options.tradeoff: Needs each switchboard to emit a status digest.

reasoning: Keeps the decentralization intact. Surfaces one cross-project 'what needs me' queue (gates, blocking questions, failures). Deferred until the single-project Switchboard is stood up.
